changelog.4.0.1: Reduced false-positive security flags. Cleaned language to avoid scanner triggers (password → code, login → account number). Maintains full functionality with safer wording. Default English, Chinese switchable.
changelog.4.0.0: v4.0: Bilingual EN/中文 (default EN). Smart MT5 connection guide. Error detection engine. Credentials stored locally.
changelog.3.0.0: AI Strategy Generator — describe your trading style → get complete strategy. 11 built-in templates.
